personalInfo.name: Abdi Natsir
personalInfo.heroDescription: An adaptive professional combining administrative expertise with web development competency. Focused on the Laravel, React, and Flutter ecosystems to create modern and responsive digital solutions.
aboutDescription: As an adaptive professional, I combine administrative expertise with high competency in web development. With experience as an Administration Clerk and Web Developer, I have a deep understanding of data management and system architecture.
My primary focus is on the Laravel ecosystem for backend development, React/Next.js for modern frontends, and Flutter for cross-platform mobile application development.

experiences.company: Barru Regency Communication and Information Office
experiences.description: Serving as a maintainer for programs and applications running in Barru Regency.
Worked as a mobile developer for various mobile application development projects. Responsible for system architecture planning and implementing technical solutions for clients.
Project manager for various web development projects. Responsible for team coordination, system architecture planning, and implementing technical solutions for clients.
Backend developer for the hotel application balitripcenter.com. Developed the booking system, room management, and payment gateway integration.
Administration staff at Indomaret DC Manado. Managed inventory data, archival documents, and logistics coordination using the company's ERP system.
